name: Summer Berry Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 Pie crust (9 inch) - baked and cooled
1 package Strawberry gelatin powder - Jello, 4-serving pkg
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix berries and pour into pastry shell.
2. In a medium saucepan, mix sugar and cornstarch. Gradually stir in water until smooth.
3. Cook on medium heat until the mixture comes to a boil; boil for 1 minute.
4. Remove from heat and stir in gelatin until dissolved.
5. Cool mixture to room temperature.
6. Pour over berries in pastry shell.
7. Refrigerate for 3 hours.
8. Spread whipped topping over pie before serving.
9. Garnish with additional berries, if desired.
